description_long: This is a large, industrial locomotive train with a robust, angular body painted primarily in yellow and gray tones. The front features a prominent cab with windows and a streamlined nose, while the sides display a series of vents, grilles, and access panels typical of diesel-electric freight locomotives. The roof is equipped with raised sections and exhaust ports, indicating powerful internal machinery. The undercarriage is supported by multiple sets of black wheels and visible suspension components. Safety railings run along the sides, and there are ladders and steps for crew access. The overall design is utilitarian, built for heavy-duty rail transport in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large yellow and gray diesel-electric locomotive with a robust, angular body, side railings, and multiple wheels. It features industrial details like vents, grilles, and a streamlined cab.
description_view_0: Front view showing the streamlined nose, cab windows, and front railings.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length, side railings, vents, grilles, and wheel assemblies.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the locomotive, roof details, and rear railings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features to view 1, including side panels, windows, and wheels.
